title: Bead Path Builder
description: A fine-motor build game where kids string beads onto ghost spots along a gentle path.
learningGoals: Practice controlled placement on a path
Follow simple bead patterns with color and shape cues
interactionModel: build-assemble drag or tap-tap bead cards onto curved ghost spots
feedbackModel: Correct beads pop, sparkle, and speak their count or shape; misses wiggle gently with a spoken nudge and retry. Finished strings celebrate with a short voice line.

modes.title: String the Beads
modes.skill: left-to-right controlled placement along a curve

modes.title: Fancy Strings
modes.skill: placing alternating bead shapes on a curved path

credits: Kaigani; placeholder emoji and swatch cards rendered by the shared build-assemble engine. Built with Codex for QLOBE Kids.
